language.title: Choose your language
language.subtitle: You can change the language anytime in Settings.

modes.title: What do you want to track?
modes.subtitle: Pick the modes you want to use. You can add more anytime.
modes.later_unlocks: Additional modes unlock automatically as they become available.

permissions.title: Almost there
permissions.notifications_body: We only notify you when you unlock an achievement — no other pushes. You can change this anytime in the system settings.
permissions.privacy_body: All journey data stays local on your device. No account required, no server sync, no tracking without consent.

first_journey.title: Want a sample journey?
first_journey.subtitle: We can drop in a sample flight — Frankfurt to New York with Lufthansa, yesterday. That way you immediately see the map, stats and achievements fill up. You can delete the journey anytime.
first_journey.label: Sample journey
first_journey.sample_note: Sample journey — you can delete it anytime.

map.empty: Log your first journey — it shows up here immediately.

achievement.hidden_hint: This achievement is still hidden — log more journeys to discover it.

premium.mock_desc: No RevenueCat API key set. Purchases above are no-ops; use the toggle for UI tests.
premium.fineprint: Auto-renews · cancel anytime in your App Store settings.

backup.create_desc: Saves all data as a JSON file. Use the share sheet to drop it into iCloud Drive or Google Drive.
backup.restore_desc: Pick a previously exported Trazia backup file (.json).
backup.wipe_desc: Resets Trazia to its initial state. Make a backup or export first.
backup.wipe_confirm_body: Journeys, achievements, and settings will be permanently removed.
backup.wipe_double_body: Final warning. There is no undo and no automatic backup.
backup.wipe_done: All data deleted — please restart the app.
backup.restore_body: All current journeys will be overwritten. This action cannot be undone.
backup.restore_invalid: File is not a valid Trazia backup.
backup.restore_corrupt: Backup file is damaged — your data is unchanged.
backup.restore_tx_failed: Restore failed — your data is unchanged.

export.preamble: Every export goes to you via the system share sheet — Trazia never sends anything to third parties.
export.json_desc: Complete, machine-readable snapshot of your data. Also on the free plan.
export.csv_desc: Journeys as a spreadsheet for Excel / Numbers.
export.pdf_desc: Visual journey report including route map, top routes, and achievements.

about.credit_ourairports: Free-to-use airport data for the whole world.
about.credit_openflights: Database of airports, airlines, and routes.
about.credit_nasa: Public-domain textures, planned for the 3D globe.
about.credit_stack: Open-source libraries that make Trazia possible.
about.licenses_note: Open-source licenses will be bundled as a generated list in a later update.

profile.title: Profile
profile.sound_desc: Play the achievement chime when unlocking.
profile.notifications_desc: Push when new achievements unlock (requires system permission).
profile.crash_reports_desc: Anonymous stack traces — currently inactive. We announce the integration at least 14 days before the update.
profile.analytics_desc: Anonymous usage events (PostHog). Helps us prioritise — opt-in.
profile.trial_desc: Watch a short ad and unlock Pro for {{days}} days (ad-free, all premium features). Once per device every 30 days.
profile.trial_used: You already used the Pro trial. Available again in ~{{days}} days.
profile.ad_unavailable: Ad video not available right now.

imprint.heading: Imprint
imprint.liability_content_text: The contents of our app were created with the greatest possible care. However, we cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of the content.
imprint.liability_links_text: Our offering contains links to external third-party websites whose contents we have no influence over. Therefore, we cannot assume any liability for these external contents.
